raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX, I made a payment of approximately {$12000.00} to XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX for a bathroom renovation project, which included replacing tiles and removing and installing a new vanity. In addition to this payment, I had also purchased {$4000.00} worth of tiles separately for the project. The contractor requested the full payment upfront, which I provided. However, they failed to deliver the agreed-upon services and caused substantial damage to the bathroom wall during the process. This damage required me to hire another company to remediate it, incurring additional costs. 

Despite multiple attempts to contact XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX via phone and email to request a refund, they never responded. I provided all necessary evidence, including letters and proof of my attempts to resolve the issue directly with the XXXX, when disputing the charge with Citi Bank. Unfortunately, on XX/XX/XXXX, Citi Bank responded that they are denying my dispute, leaving me with both the financial loss of around {$12000.00} and the additional expenses of repairing the damage caused, plus the {$4000.00} I spent on tiles.
